name: CONTRACT-BUG-28
title: dispatch-feature-edit.py project-feature contract scan reads .claude/features as project root
description: scripts/dispatch-feature-edit.py lines 156-165 detect 'project feature' by splitting feature_path on os.sep, taking parts[0] as project_root, and checking parts[1] == 'features'. But the standard rabbit feature path is '.claude/features/<name>'. split('/') yields ['.claude', 'features', '<name>']. parts[0]='.claude' and parts[1]='features' would TRIGGER the project-feature branch and look for '.claude/contract/' which does not exist. Branch is unreachable in normal use but may trigger if a project happens to be named '.claude'. Should explicitly check that parts[0] is not '.claude'.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
